title: mentha × locyana
intro: Mentha × locyana, also known as Lemon Mint, is a hybrid species of mint, resulting from the cross between Mentha citrata and Mentha aquatica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, due to the presence of compounds like menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Lemon Mint include its potential to alleviate symptoms of nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Lemon Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
